name: Saori Kido
description: She is the reincarnation of the goddess Athena, one of the main characters of the series Saint Seiya from Masami Kurumada. Athena is the goddess of love, strategy, and hope. According to mythology, she's the goddess who inherits the control over the Earth from Zeus (her real father). Athena is said to be by birthright the goddess of battle, but she didn't believe in conquest and only fought defensive wars. She hates weapons, and thus only allows her Saints to battle using their bodies and armors

name: Seigi Nakata
description: __Height:__ 175cm (5'7") A reliable university student who wants to become a civil servant. Works part-time under [Richard](https://anilist.co/character/146058/Richard-Ranashinha-de-Vulpian). Like his name, he's straightforward until he encounters an unusual situation - then he becomes a heedless "ally of justice" ('seigi no mikata' in Japanese). name: Shinobu Oomiya
description: A graceful and air headed 15-year old girl. She previously stayed over at Alice's home in England, although she herself is rather bad at English and has generally bad grades. Shinobu has taken a liking to the English language and often tries to find opportunities to act like an English person. She has tried reading English newspapers (though she doesn't, if not, barely understands any of it) and even tried to listen in on Alice and Karen's conversations when they are speaking in English.

name: Shuuichi Tsukamoto
description: __Instrument:__ Trombone Shuuichi is a first-year high school student. He is Kumiko's childhood friend, and the two went to the same junior high school. He and Kumiko are not classmates in high school because they are studying different courses. He was originally a French horn player, but he gets to play the trombone after winning a game of rock-paper-scissors.
mediaTitles: Sound! Euphonium: The Movie - Our Promise: A Brand New Day
searchTerms: Sound! Euphonium: The Movie - Our Promise: A Brand New Day

name: Sofia Bulga
description: She is a renowned adventurer and was the strongest adventurer registered to the guild, prior to Tomoe and Mio joining. She is a dragon slayer that received the rank of SSS in honor of defeating Lancer as a dragon and is given the title "Dragon Slayer" after that.

name: Someji Kawamoto
description: The grandfather of the three Kawamoto sisters. He runs a traditional wagashi shop, Mikazuki-dō. Even though he may appear to be unexpressive, he actually dotes on his grandchildren a lot, in particular Momo. Along with Akari, he likes to watch over Rei.

description: The middle brother, sixteen years old. He carries his father's sword and longs to earn Tenka's respect by surpassing him in strength. Out of all the siblings he is the most serious and responsible.

name: Su-Ho Seong
description: Sung Suho displays little interest in things that bore him and don't get his blood pumping, especially his education. He also likes to get physical against any bullies who are stupid enough to pick on him and has an intense desire to surpass his father, who always easily defeats him in their sparring matches. ~!Sung Suho is the son of [Jin-U Seong](https://anilist.co/character/129928/JinWoo-Sung) and [Hae-In Cha](https://anilist.co/character/138789/HaeIn-Cha).!~

name: Taira no Tokuko
description: Shigemori's half-sister who befriends Biwa. She becomes betrothed to Norihito, son of the Emperor. Her younger sister Moriko was married to Lord Fujiwara no Motazane (the older brother of Lord Motofusa) at the age of nine. When he died two years later, Moriko inherited his lands, angering Motofusa.

name: Tama Nekonari
description: __Type:__ Cat Girl __Occupation:__ Factory Worker __Debut:__ Chapter 141 **Girlfriend No. 025** She is a former office-worker who grew so miserable in corporate life that she decided to live life as a cat, complete with ears, paws, and tail. Rentarou meets Tama when he discovered her in a box offering herself for adoption.

name: Tao Pai Pai
description: Tao Pai Pai is Tsuru-Sen'nin's younger brother and a highly skilled assassin-for-hire. He is hired by the Red Ribbon Army in order to retrieve the Dragon Balls that Goku holds, and to kill him. He succeeds beating Goku and taking all, but one of his Dragon Balls, which saves Goku life from Tao's final strike. Tao Pai Pai returns three days later to retrieve the Dragon Ball. Goku, however, received special training from Karin during the three days, and proves to be far too strong for Tao. Tao tri

name: Tsukushi Futaba
description: __Height:__ 150 cm (4'11") A first-year student at Tsukinomori Girls' Academy and the drummer and leader of the band Morfonica. A class president who's always full of confidence. Though she tries her best, her clumsiness comes out now and then. She works tirelessly to become a reliable, trustworthy person.

name: Winnie Emex
description: Winnie, also known as Winnie the Witch, is a witch owning a bar nearby the Rimdarl Kingdom.

name: Zero
description: The original creation of Dr. Wily designed to destroy Dr. Light's ultimate creation, X. Due to a heated battle with Sigma, Zero lost his memory and instead joined X's side in maintaining world peace as a hunter. ~!Zero was the original carrier of the Maverick Virus. During the battle with Sigma he passed it on to Sigma, making him the new carrier. Zero lost his memory in the process!~

name: Ai Amano
description: Beautiful, full of boundless energy. Hard to say what she is really like, versus what she was intended to be. Video girls are generally supposed to be comforting, nubile, excellent cooks, and socially graceful, but the malfunction of Yota's VCR has made her tomboyish, at times rude, prone to violence, a terrible cook (actually, she learns to cook all by herself), but full of heart and able to feel human emotion.

name: Akihiro Altland
description: At a young age, Akihiro became human debris, constantly thrown into situations where one can die anytime anywhere, and this caused him to be cold, withdrawn, and cliquish as shown when he bluntly told Orga that he will obey any order from anyone if they are in authority. His only concern was survival. He has a somewhat friendly rivalry with Mikazuki and is frequently seen working out. He often takes the lead during dangerous operations
